HomeLearnDownloadsTracker

Downloads

Everything you need to forge a band: rules, player sheets, and labels. All free. Print sheets are HTML — open them and use your browser's print → "Save as PDF" or print directly.

Full Rulebook (PDF)

The complete v2.0 Playtest Edition rulebook. Print at home or read on a tablet.

~308 KB

Download PDF

Player Rules Sheet (Print)

A 2-page printable quick reference for the table. Letter size, 0.5" margins.

HTML — print to PDF

Open Print Sheet

Wizard / Band Record Sheet

Print 2 per band. Track Monsters, Blessed cards, dungeon log, and drift history.

HTML — print to PDF

Open Record Sheet

Avery 18294 Label Sheet

All 60 labels (15 Monster Labels, 15 Common, 15 Uncommon, 10 Rare, 5 Mythic). Print at 100% scale.

HTML — print to Avery 18294

Open Label Sheet

For tinkerers

Rules — Markdown source

Plain markdown for editing, forking, or reading anywhere.

~22 KB

View Markdown

Printing tips

  • Avery 18294 labels: print at 100% scale. Do not select "fit to page" or labels will misalign.
  • Player Rules Sheet: already sized for Letter with 0.5" margins. Print double-sided if you want a single physical sheet.
  • PDF rulebook: works on any e-reader, phone, or printer. The HTML versions are friendlier for browser print → "Save as PDF."

© 2026 DeckNForge — A persistent legacy card game from a single deck of playing cards.

v2.0 Playtest Edition · Without teamwork, your band will never survive the dungeon. Without betrayal, you'll never claim the coppers.
